CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of Parma, the club declared bankruptcy in 2015 and Gyabuaa joined the youth academy of Atalanta. He made his professional debut with Atalanta as a substitute a 3–0 Serie A win over Fiorentina on 13 December 2020. In July 2021, Gyabuaa joined Serie B club Perugia on a one-year dry loan.In July 2022, Gyabuaa joined Serie C club Pescara on a one-year loan.

CONTENT.International career: Born in Italy, Gyabuaa is of Ghanaian descent. He is a youth international for Italy.

SUMMARY: Emmanuel Gyabuaa (born 21 September 2001) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Atalanta.
